title: Tattoo Fading and Skin Aging Depth

analysis.object: T570: Tattoo Fading and Skin Aging Depth depth analysis

fresh_tattoo.description: Fresh tattoo: EML-2 precise measurement of intent in dermis
fresh_tattoo.reason: New ink is EML-2: discrete pigment particles in precise arrangement

aging_decay.description: Tattoo fades exponentially over decades: EML-1 decay
aging_decay.reason: Ink diffusion through dermis is EML-1 exponential spreading

perception.description: Color perception is logarithmic: Weber-Fechner; faded tattoo is EML-2 measurement of EML-1 decay
perception.reason: EML-2 perception of EML-1 physical process: depth mismatch creates aesthetic aging

analysis.theorem: T570: Tattoo Fading and Skin Aging Depth (S849).
